data: {"generalSituation":"With an anticyclone aloft strengthening gradually, the weather will be mainly fine and become very hot over the coast of Guangdong today to midweek next week. A southerly airstream will still bring showers to the region today and tomorrow. A trough of low pressure is expected to edge closer to the coast of southern China in the latter part of next week.
